response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with relevant technologies such as TypeScript, Node.js, and React. They have worked on various projects that demonstrate their ability to design, develop, and maintain complex applications.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages and technologies
Experience with full-stack development and relevant frameworks
Strong background in software development with a focus on testing and quality
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some skills like Kotlin/Java are not directly demonstrated in recent roles
Less experience with AI agent development compared to other areas
